parameters.query: SELECT severity, category, COUNT(*) AS n FROM incidents WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $1 AND $2 GROUP BY severity, category;
SELECT component, status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM recovery_log WHERE occurred_at BETWEEN $1 AND $2 GROUP BY component, status;
SELECT verdict, COUNT(*) AS n FROM video_inspections WHERE inspected_at BETWEEN $1 AND $2 GROUP BY verdict;

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: {"ai_summary":"Shift B (15:00-23:00 IST) saw 3 incidents (1 critical, 2 medium). The critical was a camera RTSP drop auto-recovered in 42s. Recovery success 100%.","top_issues":[{"issue":"Camera RTSP drops","count":2,"trend":"up"}],"ai_recommendations":[{"priority":"high","action":"Investigate CAM005 PoE link"}],"kpis":{"incidents":3,"auto_remediated":3,"escalated":0,"ng_count":12,"ct_drift_alerts":0}}

parameters.subject: =Shift {{ $("Compute Shift Window").item.json.shift_label }} report ({{ $("Compute Shift Window").item.json.shift_id }})

parameters.text: =:bar_chart: *Shift {{ $("Compute Shift Window").item.json.shift_label }} report* ({{ $("Compute Shift Window").item.json.shift_id }})\n_{{ $("Shift Intelligence Agent").item.json.output.ai_summary }}_
